title: October 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 8''' is the 281st day of the year (282nd in leap years). There are 84 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Bill E. Martin]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Sigourney Weaver]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Troy Denning]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Duncan Pow]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 137|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 137]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: The Golden Globe]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Iridonian Darkness]]'' published on [[Wizards.com]].
*[[2010]] – "[[Corruption (episode)|Corruption]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2016]] – "[[The Antilles Extraction]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Concept Art of Ralph McQuarrie]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Complete Marvel Comics Covers, Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Pop-Up Galaxy]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – "[[The Light You Bring]]" published on [[Electronic Arts]]' website.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars: Vader's Castle – The Deluxe Library Collection]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Clone Troopers]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon 2|''Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon'' 2]] published.
*2025 – [[Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror 2|''Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror'' 2]] published.
<noinclude>
